description: Order of payment (or rather receipt / record of payment) to the community officials Maḥfūẓ al-Shammash and Sālim al-Zariz, dated Adar 1476 Seleucid era = February/March 1165 CE. Signed by Menashshe b. Yosef and Mevorakh b. Natan he-Ḥaver. Also mentions Abū l-Bayān. (Information in part from CUDL)
description_he: שטר אשראי או קבלה בHebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
